overall.description: A cinematic night scene from Cyberpunk 2077 showing two massive holographic koi fish (one orange-gold, one electric blue) swimming in circular patterns around a neon-lit urban plaza. The camera is positioned on an elevated balcony overlooking the scene, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in vertical neon billboards and horizontal lighting strips.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza overlook surrounded by corporate towers

events.description: blue holographic koi fish swims from right side toward center, beginning its arc across the frame

agents.ego_description: stationary observation from elevated balcony, slowly panning to track the holographic fish

entered.detail: large orange-gold holographic fish with flowing fins, swimming in circular pattern around the plaza
large electric-blue holographic fish with translucent fins, swimming opposite to the orange fish
tall building facade covered in vertical neon advertisements and glowing signage
cluster of dark glass skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising behind the plaza
building with horizontal red and yellow neon lighting strips running vertically

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a neon-drenched cyberpunk cityscape at night, viewed from an elevated balcony. Two massive holographic koi fish dominate the scene—the orange one positioned on the left and the blue one entering from the right. The camera slowly pans left to track the blue fish as it swims across the center, while towering skyscrapers covered in vertical neon billboards frame the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza overlook surrounded by corporate towers

events.description: orange holographic koi fish crosses from right to left through the center of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan left to follow the swimming holographic fish

segments.scene_description: The blue holographic fish completes its crossing to the left side of the frame while the orange fish begins its journey from right to left. The camera continues its slow leftward pan, maintaining focus on the circulating holographic display against the backdrop of illuminated skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza overlook surrounded by corporate towers

events.description: blue holographic koi fish returns to center frame from the left, completing its circular circuit

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady observation as the holographic fish complete their orbital paths

segments.scene_description: The orange fish moves to the far left and begins to exit the frame while the blue fish returns to the center, completing its circular orbit around the plaza. The neon-lit skyscrapers remain constant in the background as the camera continues tracking the mesmerizing holographic display.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera pan across a neon-drenched cyberpunk cityscape, tracking the rhythmic circular orbit of two massive holographic koi fish. It begins from an elevated balcony where an orange-gold fish rests on the left and an electric blue fish enters from the right, with the camera slowly panning left to follow the blue fish as it glides across the center. As the blue fish reaches the left side of the frame, the orange fish begins its own journey from right to left, maintaining the fluid motion of the holographic display against a backdrop of towering skyscrapers and vertical billboards. The scene then shifts as the orange fish exits to the far left, allowing the blue fish to return to the center to complete its orbit. The camera continues its steady tracking motion, keeping the mesmerizing glow of the circulating fish centered against the constant, illuminated urban sprawl.
